title: Tempting Thick Croatian Sausages Skillet
description: A hearty Croatian dish featuring sausages in a rich and creamy sauce, perfect for a midnight craving. This egg-free friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add the chopped onion.
Cook the onion until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the Croatian sausages to the skillet and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the paprika, caraway seeds, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture cook for 10 minutes.
Stir in the sour cream and let it heat through.
Serve the sausages and sauce hot over mashed potatoes or eggless noodles.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
